payload.answer: I can’t reliably identify what “the thing from yesterday” refers to from this context alone. Please choose a more specific memory to repair or provide a brief description.
citations: For context, Remember the thing from yesterday.
repair_options: Ask the user to specify which memory from yesterday they mean.
Offer a shortlist of possible interpretations if more context is provided.
Keep the request vague and do not update memory until clarified.
